title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 OM-5.2 Payment and ATM Cards, Wallets and Point of Sale Infrastructure
summary: Regulates digital and card-based payment channels including contactless, cardless, QR code, e-wallet and biometric payment services subject to customer consent, registration and authentication requirements.

theme_notes.digital_finance.payments_emoney: Banking requirements for payment cards, wallets and point-of-sale infrastructure.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB retail bank operational risk modules
